---
title: "Dr. Thomas Arnold"
---

## Dr. Thomas Arnold

**Dates:** (1795-1842)

### Description

headmaster of Rugby School

### Biography

A lifelong friend of Keble and Sir John Taylor Coleridge.

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 20th [1868]
- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
